item.name: Test connection profile centralized on agent

request.description: Test connection profile centralized on agent

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Connection Profile not found or not valid

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

exec: // CTM Engineer (CE) - Demo Flow, aligned to engineer_ce.py run_expert() logic
// Place in Post-response (Tests) tab of the JOBS deploy request:
//   - ALL job types are collected and agent-tested (not just FileTransfer)
//   - Jobs with no Host field (Job:SLAManagement, Job:Dummy) show as SKIPPED
//     in the Agent Test column - nothing to resolve
//   - Host is always a hostgroup, resolved to its first member
//   - CCP testing (ConnectionProfileSrc/Dest) ONLY runs for Job:FileTransfer -
//     all other types stop after the agent test
//   - Auth: x-api-key header from collection variable "apiKey"
//   - Colored HTML report renders in Postman's Visualize tab (theme-neutral)
// ---- Step 1: extract ALL jobs (any type), recursively, with Parent tracking ----
if (node === null || typeof node !== 'object') return results;
const res = await sendRequestAsync({ url, method: "GET", header: { ...authHeader(), "Content-Type": "application/json" } });
if (res.code !== 200) return { error: `hostgroup lookup failed, status ${res.code}`, agent: null };
try { body = res.json(); } catch (e) { return { error: "non-JSON hostgroup response", agent: null }; }
if (!Array.isArray(body) || body.length === 0) return { error: "hostgroup returned empty agent list", agent: null };
try { parsed = res.json(); } catch (e) { return { status: res.code, ok: false, message: `non-JSON response, status ${res.code}` }; }
const message = parsed.message || (Array.isArray(parsed.errors) && parsed.errors[0] && parsed.errors[0].message) || `status ${res.code}, no message field`;
return { status: res.code, ok: res.code === 200, message };
async function testConnectionProfile(server, agentHost, ccpType, ccpName) {
if (!ccpName) return { skipped: true, reason: "no connection profile name on job" };
const res = await sendRequestAsync({ url, method: "POST", header: { ...authHeader(), "Content-Type": "application/json" } });
try { parsed = res.json(); } catch (e) { return { skipped: false, status: res.code, ok: false, message: `non-JSON response, status ${res.code}` }; }
const message = parsed.message || (Array.isArray(parsed.errors) && parsed.errors[0] && parsed.errors[0].message) || `status ${res.code}, no message field`;
return { skipped: false, status: res.code, ok: state, message };
console.log(`=== CTM Engineer Demo: Folder "${folder}" on server "${server}" ===`);
console.log(`  Skipping - job has no Host/Hostgroup defined`);
jobResult.agentTest = { skipped: true, reason: "no Host field on this job type" };
const { error: hgError, agent } = await getFirstHostgroupAgent(server, job.Host);
jobResult.agentTest = { ok: false, message: `HOSTGROUP LOOKUP FAILED: ${hgError}` };
console.log(`  No CCP test - job type is ${job.Type}, not Job:FileTransfer`);
console.log(`  Skipping CCP tests - agent not reachable`);
const srcTest = await testConnectionProfile(server, agent, CTM_APP_TYPE, job.ConnectionProfileSrc);
const destTest = await testConnectionProfile(server, agent, CTM_APP_TYPE, job.ConnectionProfileDest);
console.log(`Total jobs: ${totalJobs} | Agent-testable: ${agentTestable.length} | Agent failures: ${agentFailures.length} | CCP failures: ${ccpFailures.length}`);
